spec.precondition: requires valid(nd) && valid_range(nd->attached_processes, 0, MAX_PROCESSES) && exists slot: (0 <= slot < MAX_PROCESSES && nd->attached_processes[slot].pid == current_pid && nd->attached_processes[slot].open_count > 0)
spec.postcondition: (result < 0) || ((ensures (result == -1 && (forall i: (0 <= i < MAX_PROCESSES ==> nd->attached_processes[i].pid != current_pid))) || (result >= 0 && exists slot: (0 <= slot < MAX_PROCESSES && nd->attached_processes[slot].open_count == result && (result == 0 ==> nd->attached_processes[slot].pid == 0 && null(nd->attached_processes[slot].task))))) && (let slot = npid_find_process_slot(nd); (slot == -1 && result == -1) || (slot >= 0 && result == nd->attached_processes[slot].open_count - 1)))
